featureDetection.rationale: Probes for native support by calling scrollIntoView with the new container dictionary key and catching any unexpected exceptions.

gracefulFallback.rationale: Falls back gracefully and warns the user that options will be ignored silently if the host engine does not support nearest behavior.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Features a fully functional side-by-side nested scroll sandbox with live offset indicators and option selection dropdowns.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: Part of an outstanding gallery of 4 interactive concepts clarifying scrollIntoView's new parameter.

designSystemContrast.rationale: Adheres perfectly to CSS variables and retains high-contrast design properties.
